markdown:
#  View a Commitment's Schedule of Values (SOV) (Android) 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * 'Admin' level permissions on the project's Commitments tool.  
OR
    * 'Read Only' and 'Standard' level permissions can only view commitments that they have been granted access via the privacy drop-down menu when editing or creating a commitment.   
OR
    * 'Read Only' or 'Standard' level permissions on the project's Commitments tool with the ['View Private Purchase Order Contract' granular permission](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/permissions-company/tutorials/grant-granular-permissions-in-a-project-permissions-template) enabled on your permissions template.
  * **Additional Information:**
    * This item can be viewed or edited offline if it was previously viewed and cached on your mobile device. Tasks performed in offline mode sync with Procore once a network connection is reestablished.


##  Prerequisites 
  * [Create a Purchase Order](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-android/tutorials/create-a-purchase-order-android)


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Commitments** tool using the Procore app on an Android mobile device.
  2. Tap the purchase order to which you want to add a line item.
  3. Tap **Schedule of Values**.  
![Commitments Android View Commitment Schedule Of Values](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/cfbc525329c6e304f834d314c6432450/a87ce2b7d6bbb8556d00c2dc96f6c7e2/commitments-android-view-commitment-schedule-of-values.png?fm=webp)_  
Note:_ This action reveals a list of the line items belonging to the purchase order's Schedule of Values (SOV).
  4. _Optional:_ Tap a line item to view its details.


## See Also
  * [Which Procore tools support Work Breakdown Structure?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-which-procore-tools-support-work-breakdown-structure)
  * [Commitments (Android) - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-android/permissions)
  * [View Purchase Orders and Subcontracts (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-android/tutorials/view-purchase-orders-and-subcontracts-android)
title: View a Commitment's Schedule of Values (SOV) (Android)
description: How to view the schedule of values for a purchase order using the Procore app on an Android mobile device.
